remaining_tasks.name: Correlate subagent→parent via parentToolUseID (explicit span link)
Capture mid-turn queue-operation messages in spans

decisions.rationale: No separate workflow span for subagents — internal spans (turns, inference, tools) are children of parent workflow span, distinguishable by scope.agentic.session

decisions.decision: entity.1.name defaults to 'sub-agent' when subagent_type not explicitly provided
decisions.rationale: Don't use 'general-purpose' unless it's explicitly in the JSONL — it was just a code default, not meaningful metadata

decisions.decision: Sub-agent workflow spans are children of parent workflow span via OTel context nesting
decisions.rationale: Shared trace_id without needing explicit parentToolUseID correlation

decisions.decision: Agent span renamed from Tool: Agent to Sub-Agent: {type}
decisions.rationale: span.type is agentic.invocation not agentic.tool.invocation — naming should reflect delegation not tool call

decisions.decision: Mid-turn queue-operation messages have no hook event
decisions.rationale: Only discoverable by scanning JSONL for type=queue-operation in Stop hook

next_action: Commit current changes (remove subagent workflow span, entity.name default, HOOK_PLAN updates), then implement parentToolUseID correlation or verify traces in production
context_notes: This session: removed the workflow.claude_code.subagent wrapper span, changed entity.1.name default to 'sub-agent', added ToC + 21-question motivation section + Line 252 JSON example to HOOK_PLAN.md. All 4 tests pass. The subagent internal spans now nest directly under the parent workflow span with no intermediate wrapper.
